prose: Frontier orbital analysis of furan was executed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory, performed in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The DFT computation did not re-optimize geometry but used the coordinates directly from a pre-provided file (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz). The highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) energy was calculated to be -6.35976 eV, the lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) energy was -0.10240 eV, resulting in a HOMO–LUMO gap of 6.25736 eV. Convergence of the self-consistent field (SCF) was confirmed after 9 cycles, ensuring trustworthy results. The method employed density fitting as part of the PySCF calculation. The .out file for this run was written live to '/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8nhcctnz/live.json' allowing real-time monitoring during execution.
